title: Train Utilities
description: I have added a few Utilities helpful if you are using a mod such as MTR or Create to make trains.
body:
For all the train nerds who want a whistle to blow this adds the simple dispatch and door whistles. :-) 
(and a lot more things now LOL)
This is my first mod so if its bad please dont be mean. :-)
I made this using MCreator.
Alert! This mod does NOT add trains of any sort just the utilities.
Also, please sub to me on YT here:
[Subscribe](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzw-jdLbU1cw_ztp1LwmIbw?sub_confirmation=1)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/f-vxN1Xr3Ew" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
I have stopped updating this mod. If you think I should, let me know.
